race.comment: SWINGMAN (3) looks well placed on recent form, missing by a combined 1.3L in his last three starts, all in this grade. Cooper's claim comes in handy and he's bumped into some handy types in his past few starts. Can sit up on the speed and it wouldn't surprise to see him go one better now. STORM AWAY (6) flew home to just miss in easier company here first-up, but it was a promising return in defeat when favourite. He's likely to be back in the run from the draw again, but he'll be fitter for that effort and he's proven at this level last campaign. Can make a statement. SLIP THE JAB (9) is another progressive type who comes through the same races as SWINGMAN. CJP rides now and that form looks strong for a race like this. Can get into the finish again. YES QUEEN (4) bolted in at the trials recently and has joined the Dickson stable since her last run. Can play a leading role. KINGS COURT (1) is in winning form and can't be discounted.
